name: Requirements Stale Human Review Rework Pipeline
description: Requirements workflow where an earlier human approval is superseded after downstream rework.
outcome: A prior approval is preserved in history but superseded when a later revision reopens and clears the same gate again.

definition.process_instructions: The product strategist drafts the brief. The technical editor refines it. A human review gate approves the review-ready brief. Downstream packaging is then assessed for compliance, and request_changes from that downstream assessment reopens the brief. The earlier approval remains in history but becomes superseded when the next revision clears the gate again.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: approval-gate
stages.goal: A human decision exists for the brief.

stages.name: launch-packaging
stages.goal: The approved launch packet is prepared and assessed.

checkpoints.goal: A human decision exists for the brief.

checkpoints.name: launch-packaging
checkpoints.goal: The approved launch packet is ready.
